subcodes.first_line: O Javád! The Lord of Creation calleth thee from the direction of His Name, the Most Exalted, the Most Great. Verily, there is no God but [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا جواد ینادیک مالک الایجاد من شطر اسمه العلی العظیم انه لا اله الا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
